name: Pizza Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the ground beef, seasoned bread crumbs, milk, dried minced onion, garlic salt, and pepper. Mix until just combined.
2. Shape the mixture into 48 small meatballs.
3. Cut mozzarella cheese into 48 cubes, each about ½ inch in size. Push one cube into the center of each meatball, ensuring the cheese is completely covered by the meat.
4. Roll the meatballs lightly in flour.
5. In a large skillet, cook the meatballs in oil over medium heat until browned on all sides. Remove excess oil with a slotted spoon.
6. Add pizza sauce to the skillet and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce the heat and simmer for 25-30 minutes, or until the meatballs are no longer pink inside when cut open.
8. Serve the cooked meatballs over pasta or rice, in buns, or as an appetizer.
